# `kitty-misc` sequences

<!-- Generated by `qdb generate reference` from `db/kitty-misc.toml`. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Move Screen Contents To Scrollback (`kitty.misc.unscroll`)

Kitty documents this as an extension for moving screen contents into scrollback.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 3 ; 1 J`
- References: [kitty Miscellaneous Protocol Extensions](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/protocol-extensions/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Notes: fixture withheld: on the audit discard list pending re-verification

## Save Terminal Modes (`kitty.misc.save_modes`)

Simple private save/restore for terminal modes.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? s`
- References: [kitty Miscellaneous Protocol Extensions](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/protocol-extensions/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Notes: fixture withheld: on the audit discard list pending re-verification

## Restore Terminal Modes (`kitty.misc.restore_modes`)

Restores terminal modes saved by the matching Kitty private save command.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI ? r`
- References: [kitty Miscellaneous Protocol Extensions](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/protocol-extensions/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Notes: fixture withheld: on the audit discard list pending re-verification
